privileged_info_summary: No privileged information metadata defined in task.json. The color_to_alpha task uses real Unsplash photo images as primary data source (JPEG RGB mode, 500x375 pixels). Fallback mechanism uses ImageMagick-generated synthetic image with white background. Verification thresholds are consistent: 15% minimum transparency, 30% minimum white pixel reduction, PNG format required, score ≥75 for pass. All verification logic matches documented claims in README.
